response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrable technical depth across languages and systems, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or direct impact on AI-driven cloud products — key requirements for this principal engineer role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems
Strong track record of technical leadership, workshops, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or deployment experience listed
Lacks demonstrated cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience in AI
Education is a BS in CS; no advanced degree in AI or related field
